records.ety: [L. impassibilis; pref. im- not + passibilis passable: cf. F. impassible. See Passible.]

defs: Incapable of suffering; inaccessible to harm or pain; not to be touched or moved to passion or sympathy; unfeeling, or not showing feeling; without sensation.
quotes: Secure of death, I should contemn thy dart Though naked, and impassible depart.
